description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and an open central courtyard featuring lush landscaping and palm trees. The structure is organized around the courtyard, with multiple rooms and corridors radiating outward, and large glass windows and sliding doors providing ample natural light. The exterior walls are a mix of white and dark finishes, with some sections featuring vertical green landscaping elements. There is a long driveway leading to the main entrance, and a swimming pool is visible along one side of the property. The house includes several outdoor living spaces, such as patios and terraces, seamlessly blending indoor and outdoor environments. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection to nature.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, central courtyard, and extensive glass windows, featuring a pool and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and central courtyard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, backyard landscaping, and large glass windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the open courtyard, green vertical landscaping, and patio areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, outdoor living spaces, and multiple room layouts.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a wide, modern door, minimal steps, and a covered approach flanked by landscaping.
